name: Gutendex
description: List and filter Project Gutenberg books by author, language, topic, or search text, and retrieve one book's metadata by ID.

auth.hint: Gutendex is a public, unauthenticated API; no credential is required.

tools.name: list_books
tools.description: List and filter Project Gutenberg books, ordered by popularity by default.

params.name: search
params.description: Space-separated, case-insensitive words to search in author names and book titles.

params.name: languages
params.description: Comma-separated two-character language codes, such as en or fr,fi.

params.name: topic
params.description: Case-insensitive key phrase to search in bookshelves or subjects.

params.name: copyright
params.description: Comma-separated copyright filters: true, false, or null.

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated Project Gutenberg ID numbers to restrict results to.

params.name: mime_type
params.description: MIME type prefix, such as text/ or text/html, to filter available formats.

params.name: author_year_start
params.description: Include books with at least one author alive at or after this year (negative for BCE).

params.name: author_year_end
params.description: Include books with at least one author alive at or before this year (negative for BCE).

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order: ascending, descending, or popular (default) by Project Gutenberg ID or download count.

params.name: page
params.description: One-based page number for paginated results.

tools.name: get_book
tools.description: Retrieve one Project Gutenberg book's metadata by its ID.

params.name: id
params.description: Project Gutenberg ID number of the book.
